ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., M, L, XL, XXL, 3XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of the size (e.g., standard, petite, plus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "across_shoulder" REAL /* Measurement across the shoulder in cm */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement in cm */,
  "front_length" REAL /* Front length measurement in cm */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manufacturer, retailer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., design, production, sales) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update (e.g., design change, production issue) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_updates_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the size was sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in the market */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sales, inventory, trends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_reports_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "market_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the market */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the market is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_market" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market */,
  "size_distribution" REAL /* Distribution of the size in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id", "market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., sales, demand) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, update, report) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
